experts.name: Dr Jane Smith
experts.title: Consultant Oncologist
experts.bio: Dr Jane Smith is available to comment on cancer diagnosis, screening pathways and the practical challenges of improving access to earlier detection.

experts.name: Professor Adam Green
experts.title: Health Data Research Lead
experts.bio: Professor Adam Green can comment on the use of AI and data-led tools in healthcare, including implementation, trust and system readiness.

stories.title: How AI tools are changing diagnostics outside hospital
stories.summary: A timely story opportunity on how AI-enabled diagnostic tools could support earlier triage and decision-making in community care.
stories.why_now: Growing interest in productivity, NHS capacity and safe adoption of digital tools.

stories.title: Why earlier cancer diagnosis remains a system challenge
stories.summary: An expert-led angle on what needs to change to improve early cancer diagnosis across referral and screening pathways.
stories.why_now: Relevant to prevention, NHS performance and screening policy conversations.

clients.name: Example Health
clients.description: Example Health works across oncology and diagnostics, with a focus on improving access to earlier detection and more joined-up patient pathways.

clients.name: Example MedTech
clients.description: Example MedTech develops digital tools designed to support healthcare professionals in diagnosis, triage and service planning.
